title: Páginas de Sessions: Lista por Dia + Drill-Down por Sessão
plan: Read existing sessions.html baseline, data.py, and routes/cash.py to understand current state
Enhance routes/cash.py to prepare session-level data (health badges per stat, sparkline chart points, day comparisons) and add optional /cash/sessions/<date> drill-down route

Rewrite src/web/templates/cash/sessions.html with: day-level summary cards (date, hands, net, VPIP/PFR/AF, health badge), expandable day sections with session cards showing full stats, sparklines, notable hands, EV mini-chart, leak button, and best/worst comparison
Add CSS to style.css for session detail cards, expandable sections, sparkline SVGs, mini EV charts, health badges per session stat, and responsive layout
Add JavaScript to app.js for expand/collapse day sections, pagination/infinite scroll, and sparkline rendering helpers
Create src/web/templates/tournament/sessions.html mirroring cash version with tournament-specific adaptations (ROI, tournament cards instead of session cards)
Update tournament routes if needed to support drill-down
Test all pages render correctly with real data from analytics.db
